requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Djibouti BESS; China GB 38031 Not Accepted
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为吉布提BESS国际基准；中国GB 38031不被接受
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為吉布地BESS國際基準；中國GB 38031不被接受

summary.en: Djibouti does not have a strong national standards body and has no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. There is no Djibouti equivalent of Saudi Arabia's SABER system, the EU Battery Regulation, or similar mandatory certification regimes. However, Djibouti's French/IEC technical legacy means that IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules for any project accepted by the Ministry of Energy or EDD. Project owners, EPCs, and lenders financing BESS projects in Djibouti will reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. Djibouti has no local testing laboratory or certification body capable of conducting IEC 62619 assessments — third-party IEC certification from a recognized international accredited body (such as UL, TÜV, SGS, Bureau Veritas, or DNV) is required. Exporters and project developers should verify current Ministry of Energy import and project approval requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 吉布提没有强有力的国家标准机构，也没有经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。吉布提没有等同于沙特阿拉伯SABER体系、欧盟《电池法规》或类似强制认证制度的机制。然而，吉布提的法国/IEC技术传统意味着IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是任何经能源部或EDD认可项目中锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。为吉布提BESS项目提供融资的项目业主、EPC承包商和贷款方将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。吉布提没有能够进行IEC 62619评估的本地测试实验室或认证机构——须从国际认可的认证机构（如UL、TÜV、SGS、Bureau Veritas或DNV）取得第三方IEC认证。出口商和项目开发商在出货前应直接向能源部核实现行进口和项目审批要求。
summary.zht: 吉布地沒有強有力的國家標準機構，也沒有經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。吉布地沒有等同於沙特阿拉伯SABER體系、歐盟《電池法規》或類似強制認證制度的機制。然而，吉布地的法國/IEC技術傳統意味著IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是任何經能源部或EDD認可項目中鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。為吉布地BESS項目提供融資的項目業主、EPC承包商和貸款方將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。吉布地沒有能夠進行IEC 62619評估的本地測試實驗室或認證機構——須從國際認可的認證機構（如UL、TÜV、SGS、Bureau Veritas或DNV）取得第三方IEC認證。出口商和項目開發商在出貨前應直接向能源部核實現行進口和項目審批要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Djibouti project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — import and project approval authority; no published BESS-specific mandatory safety regulation confirmed as of dataset date
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — utility acceptance required; no local certification body available; international third-party IEC certification required

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for lithium-ion cells used in BESS is GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements), which is also applied to stationary BESS cells in Chinese project practice. From August 2025, GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) becomes the dedicated mandatory BESS cell safety standard. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. None of these Chinese standards — GB 38031, GB 44240-2024, or GB/T 36276-2023 — are accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Djibouti project specifications or Ministry of Energy approvals. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited international laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS用锂离子电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 38031-2020（电动汽车——动力蓄电池安全要求），在中国项目实践中也适用于固定式BESS电芯。自2025年8月起，GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求）成为专用的强制性BESS电芯安全标准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准——GB 38031、GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023——均不被吉布提项目规格或能源部审批接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可的国际实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 中國BESS用鋰離子電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 38031-2020（電動汽車——動力蓄電池安全要求），在中國項目實踐中也適用於固定式BESS電芯。自2025年8月起，GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求）成為專用的強制性BESS電芯安全標準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準——GB 38031、GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023——均不被吉布地項目規格或能源部審批接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可的國際實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements; applied to BESS cells in Chinese practice; not accepted in Djibouti)

GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory from August 1, 2025; not accepted in Djibouti as substitute for IEC 62619)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary; not accepted in Djibouti)

gap.en: Critical gap: Djibouti project specifications, Ministry of Energy approvals, and EDD acceptance reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 38031 and GB 44240-2024 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes. Djibouti has no local certification body — only international third-party certification from ILAC-accredited laboratories is accepted. Exporters should: (a) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited international laboratory (UL, TÜV Rheinland, SGS, Bureau Veritas, DNV) for cells and modules supplied to Djibouti BESS projects; (b) verify current Ministry of Energy import approval requirements directly before shipment — published requirements are not available from official online sources as of the dataset date; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：吉布提项目规格、能源部审批及EDD认可将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 38031和GB 44240-2024未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为替代依据。吉布提没有本地认证机构——仅接受来自ILAC认可实验室的国际第三方认证。出口商应：（a）从ILAC认可的国际实验室（UL、TÜV莱茵、SGS、必维、DNV）为供应至吉布提BESS项目的电芯和模组取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；（b）在出货前直接向能源部核实现行进口审批要求——截至本数据集日期，官方在线来源无法获取已公布要求；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619适用版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：吉布地項目規格、能源部審批及EDD認可將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 38031和GB 44240-2024未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為替代依據。吉布地沒有本地認證機構——僅接受來自ILAC認可實驗室的國際第三方認證。出口商應：（a）從ILAC認可的國際實驗室（UL、TÜV萊茵、SGS、必維、DNV）為供應至吉布地BESS項目的電芯和模組取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（b）在出貨前直接向能源部核實現行進口審批要求——截至本數據集日期，官方在線來源無法獲取已公布要求；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619適用版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where Ministry of Energy or EDD project specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; no published standalone mandatory Djibouti BESS safety regulation confirmed — verify directly with Ministry of Energy; no local certification body available
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for lithium BESS cells effective August 1, 2025; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for traction batteries applied in practice to BESS; not accepted in Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Djibouti as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Djibouti project specifications given the country's IEC/French technical legacy. Chinese GB 38031 and GB 44240-2024 certification alone is not sufficient for Djibouti project acceptance. Djibouti has no local certification body — international third-party IEC 62619 certification from an ILAC-accredited body is required. Verify Ministry of Energy current import and project approval requirements directly before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，吉布提未发现经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。然而，鉴于该国IEC/法国技术传统，IEC 62619是吉布提项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 38031和GB 44240-2024认证不足以满足吉布提项目验收要求。吉布提没有本地认证机构——须取得来自ILAC认可机构的国际第三方IEC 62619认证。出货前请直接向能源部核实现行进口和项目审批要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，吉布地未發現經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。然而，鑑於該國IEC/法國技術傳統，IEC 62619是吉布地項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 38031和GB 44240-2024認證不足以滿足吉布地項目驗收要求。吉布地沒有本地認證機構——須取得來自ILAC認可機構的國際第三方IEC 62619認證。出貨前請直接向能源部核實現行進口和項目審批要求。

requirement_topic.en: System-Level Safety — IEC 62933-5-2 and Ministry of Energy Approval; No Local Certification Body
requirement_topic.zh: 系统级安全——IEC 62933-5-2及能源部审批；无本地认证机构
requirement_topic.zht: 系統級安全——IEC 62933-5-2及能源部審批；無本地認證機構

summary.en: At the system level, Djibouti has no published national BESS system safety standard. The applicable international framework for system-level safety is IEC 62933-5-2 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for Grid-integrated Electrochemical-based Systems) and IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Considerations — Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Risk Mitigation). Ministry of Energy approval is required for utility-scale BESS projects and EDD acceptance is required for grid connection. Neither the Ministry of Energy nor EDD has a published list of accepted conformity assessment bodies. In the absence of a local certification body, system-level safety evidence must be provided by internationally recognised third-party bodies (UL, TÜV, SGS, Bureau Veritas, DNV) holding ILAC accreditation for the relevant IEC standards. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 system-level safety compliance is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 requirements. All system-level safety requirements must be confirmed with the Ministry of Energy and EDD for each project.
summary.zh: 在系统层面，吉布提没有已公布的国家BESS系统安全标准。适用的系统级安全国际框架为IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统——并网电化学系统安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-1:2024（电化学储能系统——安全考量——危险识别、风险评估和风险缓解）。公用事业规模BESS项目须取得能源部批准，并网须取得EDD认可。能源部和EDD均未公布已接受合格评定机构的名单。在没有本地认证机构的情况下，系统级安全证据须由持有相关IEC标准ILAC认可资质的国际知名第三方机构（UL、TÜV、SGS、必维、DNV）提供。中国GB/T 36558-2023系统级安全合规不被接受为IEC 62933-5-2要求的等效依据。所有系统级安全要求须就每个项目向能源部和EDD确认。
summary.zht: 在系統層面，吉布地沒有已公布的國家BESS系統安全標準。適用的系統級安全國際框架為IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統——併網電化學系統安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-1:2024（電化學儲能系統——安全考量——危險識別、風險評估和風險緩解）。公用事業規模BESS項目須取得能源部批准，併網須取得EDD認可。能源部和EDD均未公布已接受合格評定機構的名單。在沒有本地認證機構的情況下，系統級安全證據須由持有相關IEC標準ILAC認可資質的國際知名第三方機構（UL、TÜV、SGS、必維、DNV）提供。中國GB/T 36558-2023系統級安全合規不被接受為IEC 62933-5-2要求的等效依據。所有系統級安全要求須就每個項目向能源部和EDD確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for Grid-integrated Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems (expected system-level safety reference for Djibouti BESS projects)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project-level approval authority; no published system safety requirements for BESS confirmed as of dataset date
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — utility acceptance required for grid-connected systems; no local conformity assessment body available

summary.en: China's system-level BESS safety requirements are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Specification for Lithium-Ion Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station). System integration and grid-connection safety is assessed through NEA-authorised procedures by State Grid Corporation and China Southern Power Grid. These Chinese system-level standards and NEA approval procedures are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62933-5-2 by the Djibouti Ministry of Energy or EDD. Third-party IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence from an internationally recognised accredited body is required for Djibouti project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国系统级BESS安全要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）管控。系统集成和并网安全通过NEA授权程序由国家电网和南方电网评估。上述中国系统级标准和NEA审批程序不被吉布提能源部或EDD接受为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。须提供来自国际知名认可机构的第三方IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据，以满足吉布提项目验收要求。
summary.zht: 中國系統級BESS安全要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）管控。系統集成和併網安全通過NEA授權程序由國家電網和南方電網評估。上述中國系統級標準和NEA審批程序不被吉布地能源部或EDD接受為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。須提供來自國際知名認可機構的第三方IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據，以滿足吉布地項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; not accepted in Djibouti)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management System; not accepted in Djibouti)

gap.en: Gap: Djibouti has no system-level BESS national standard and no local conformity assessment body. Chinese GB/T 36558 system-level compliance has no equivalence pathway in Djibouti. Third-party IEC 62933-5-2 certification from an ILAC-accredited international body is required. Actions: (a) obtain system-level safety assessment under IEC 62933-5-2 from an internationally recognised accredited body before project commissioning; (b) prepare a hazard identification and risk assessment under IEC 62933-5-1:2024 for submission to the Ministry of Energy and EDD; (c) confirm with the Ministry of Energy whether any specific third-party body is required or preferred for Djibouti BESS project approvals; (d) note that the absence of a local certification body means all certification work must be conducted overseas — plan for longer certification lead times.
gap.zh: 差距：吉布提没有系统级BESS国家标准，也没有本地合格评定机构。中国GB/T 36558系统级合规在吉布提没有等效途径。须从ILAC认可的国际机构取得第三方IEC 62933-5-2认证。行动：（a）在项目投入使用前从国际知名认可机构取得IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全评估；（b）按照IEC 62933-5-1:2024准备危险识别和风险评估报告，供能源部和EDD审查；（c）向能源部确认吉布提BESS项目审批是否需要或倾向于特定第三方机构；（d）注意缺乏本地认证机构意味着所有认证工作须在海外进行——规划更长的认证周期。
gap.zht: 差距：吉布地沒有系統級BESS國家標準，也沒有本地合格評定機構。中國GB/T 36558系統級合規在吉布地沒有等效途徑。須從ILAC認可的國際機構取得第三方IEC 62933-5-2認證。行動：（a）在項目投入使用前從國際知名認可機構取得IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全評估；（b）按照IEC 62933-5-1:2024準備危險識別和風險評估報告，供能源部和EDD審查；（c）向能源部確認吉布地BESS項目審批是否需要或傾向於特定第三方機構；（d）注意缺乏本地認證機構意味著所有認證工作須在海外進行——規劃更長的認證週期。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — Ministry of Energy approval and EDD acceptance required for all utility-scale BESS; system-level safety evidence expected to follow IEC 62933-5-2; no local certification body available; international third-party certification required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific under Chinese NEA approval procedures and GB/T 36558; not transferable to Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti has no system-level BESS national standard and no local certification body. Chinese GB/T 36558 system-level safety compliance is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Djibouti project or authority review. Third-party IEC 62933-5-2 system safety certification from an ILAC-accredited international body is required. Confirm Ministry of Energy and EDD specific acceptance criteria and any preferred conformity assessment bodies directly for each project before committing to a certification programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提没有系统级BESS国家标准，也没有本地认证机构。中国GB/T 36558系统级安全合规不被接受为吉布提项目或主管机关审查中IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。须从ILAC认可的国际机构取得第三方IEC 62933-5-2系统安全认证。在启动认证计划前，请就每个项目直接向能源部和EDD确认具体验收标准及任何首选合格评定机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地沒有系統級BESS國家標準，也沒有本地認證機構。中國GB/T 36558系統級安全合規不被接受為吉布地項目或主管機關審查中IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。須從ILAC認可的國際機構取得第三方IEC 62933-5-2系統安全認證。在啟動認證計畫前，請就每個項目直接向能源部和EDD確認具體驗收標準及任何首選合格評定機構。
